Lyrics.text:
Eo anivon'ahiahy
Mijere, Tompo ô, mijere
Ory loatra ny fanahy
Tompo tia ô, mijere

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Mihainoa fa miantso Anao
(Miantso anao)
Mamalia fa mitalaho
(Mitalaho)
Tompo ô, rahoviana re?
Efa miandry ela be (ela be).

Hodidinim-pahotana
Mamonje Tompo ô, mamonje
Tano 'ndrao tsy mahatana,
Tompo tia ô, mamonje.

Ady lava isan'ora
Manampia Tompo ô, manampia
Isan'andro voakora
Tompo tia ô, manampia.
